__note: Stage T curated taste-tier prior. Idempotent (only fills a null tasteTier). tasteTierSource is set to 'curated' — the authoritative prior. User ratings blend on top via Bayesian shrinkage and NEVER overwrite these tiers. 'bySource' maps a recipe.source to a tier; 'byName' overrides specific recipes by exact name (editorial). Ratings + the LLM (capped at really_good) supply the other tiers over time.
